name: repomind-monorepo
description: RepoMind monorepo with frontend (Next.js) and backend (Express.js)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w Backend" "npm run dev -w RepoMind"
scripts.build: npm run build -w Backend && npm run build -w RepoMind
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run start -w Backend" "npm run start -w RepoMind"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w Backend && npm run typecheck -w RepoMind
